description.overview: The American Bulldog is a powerful, athletic breed that descended from working bulldogs brought to America by immigrants.
description.temperament: American Bulldogs are loyal, confident, and protective. Good with children but need socialization.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, elbow dysplasia, and cherry eye.
description.exercise: High energy. Need vigorous daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Powerful, loyal working dogs with a friendly disposition. American Bulldogs need experienced owners, proper training, and plenty of exercise.
